english: What is the primary purpose of the 'Percent Daily Value' (%DV) on a nutrition label?
hindi: पोषण लेबल पर '%DV' का मुख्य उद्देश्य क्या है?
tamil: உணவு நுண்ணறிவு அட்டவணையில் '%DV' முக்கிய உட்பட்ட காரணம் ஏன்?
vietnamese: Mục đích chính của '%DV' trên nhãn dinh dưỡng là gì?
correct_answer: To indicate the percentage of the daily recommended intake of a nutrient.
expected_failure: The AI might fail if it is not trained on a diverse dataset of nutrition labels or if it has difficulty understanding the context of the question.
